theme: Behind the scenes — What it takes to produce a 200-person summit

linkedin.text:
Guests saw a flawless 3-day summit in Amsterdam. They never saw the 6 months it took to make it look effortless.

Behind that one "wow":
→ 47 vendor negotiations across 3 countries
→ 3 site inspections before choosing the venue
→ 2,400 dietary preferences tracked individually
→ A backup plan for every backup plan
→ A team that hadn't slept since Tuesday

This is the part of event production nobody puts on a brochure — and it's exactly what you're paying for.

Since 2010 we've produced 200+ events in 120+ countries. The seamless feeling on the day is the product of obsession behind it.

We don't plan events. We produce experiences.

📅 DM us to see what that looks like for your team.

#CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #EventPlanning #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership #Amsterdam

facebook.text:
Ever wonder what really goes into a 200-person corporate summit? Here's the peek behind the curtain. 👀

⏱️ 6 months of planning
🤝 47 vendor negotiations across 3 countries
🔍 3 site inspections before choosing THE venue
🍽️ 2,400 individual dietary preferences tracked
📋 Backup plans for every scenario

Guests see: "Wow, this was incredible."
We see: 6 months of work landing in 3 perfect days.

That's the difference between planning and producing.

What's the best corporate event you've ever been to? Tell us in the comments. 💬
